title: Alphabets A-E
description: Learn the first 5 letters of Indian Sign Language.

signs.description: Make a fist with thumb resting on the side.
Hold all four fingers straight up, thumb folded across palm.
Curve fingers and thumb to form the letter C.
Index finger points up, other fingers and thumb form a circle.
Curl all fingers down, thumb tucked under.

title: Alphabets F-J
description: Continue with the next 5 letters of ISL.

signs.description: Touch index finger to thumb, other fingers extended.
Index finger and thumb point sideways.
Index and middle finger point sideways together.
Pinky finger raised, other fingers folded.
Pinky raised and trace a J motion.

title: Alphabets K-O
description: Learn ISL letters K through O.

signs.description: Index and middle finger up, thumb between them.
Index finger up, thumb out forming an L shape.
Three fingers folded over thumb.
Two fingers folded over thumb.
All fingers and thumb curved to form O.

title: Alphabets P-T
description: Learn ISL letters P through T.

signs.description: Index finger points down, middle finger out, thumb to side.
Index and thumb point down.
Index and middle finger crossed.
Fist with thumb over fingers.
Thumb between index and middle finger.

title: Alphabets U-Z
description: Complete the ISL alphabet with U through Z.

signs.description: Index and middle fingers up together.
Index and middle fingers up, spread apart.
Three fingers (index, middle, ring) up and spread.
Index finger bent/hooked.
Thumb and pinky extended.
Index finger traces a Z in the air.

title: Numbers 1-5
description: Learn how to sign numbers 1 through 5.

signs.description: Index finger extended upward.
Index and middle fingers up.
Thumb, index, and middle fingers up.
Four fingers up, thumb tucked.
All five fingers spread open.

title: Numbers 6-10
description: Learn how to sign numbers 6 through 10.

signs.description: Pinky and thumb touch, other fingers spread.
Ring finger and thumb touch.
Middle finger and thumb touch.
Index finger and thumb touch in a loop.
Thumbs-up with a small twist motion.

title: Common Greetings
description: Learn everyday greetings in Indian Sign Language.

signs.description: Open hand, fingertips near forehead, then swing out.
Wave hand side to side with open palm.
Flat hand from lips, moves forward.
Flat hand circles over chest.
Fist circles over chest.
Thumb touches chin with open hand.
Thumb touches forehead with open hand.
L hand from chin moves down to stack on other hand.
L hand from forehead moves down to stack on other hand.
Interlock index fingers, then reverse.
Index finger brushes down over lips.
B hand shakes at shoulder level.
G hand shakes at shoulder level.
Y hand shakes at shoulder level.
Open hand on chest, then pull out to closed hand.
